name: Low income single earner
description: Employee earning €20,000 annually. INPS contributions (2.19% after cuneo fiscale) are deducted from gross BEFORE calculating IRPEF. Includes employment tax credit (creates no-tax area), €1,000 fixed deduction for 2026.

sources.description: INPS employee contributions are deducted from gross before IRPEF calculation (Rivermate.com)
Employment tax credit (detrazione lavoro dipendente) significantly reduces effective tax rate
2026 Budget Law - €1,000 fixed deduction for incomes up to €32,000
